message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "QuerySet" as QuerySet
participant "Tokenizer" as Tokenizer
participant "QueryParser" as QueryParser

User --> QuerySet : 1 QuerySet()
User --> QuerySet : 2 add("longitude", "*/CLON")

QuerySet --> QueryParser : 3 parse(queryString)

QueryParser --> Tokenizer : 4 tokenize(queryString)
Tokenizer <--> QueryParser : 5 tokens

QueryParser ..> QueryParser : [all sub-queries]

QueryParser --> Query : 6 Query()
Query --> QueryParser : [all components]

QueryParser --> QueryComponent : 7 QueryComponent()
QueryComponent --> QueryParser : 8 push_back(component)

QueryParser <--> QueryParser : 9 queries

@enduml
